features.name: meilisearch-core
features.description: Core Meilisearch HTTP server including extractors, authentication, analytics, and task queue route handlers. (merged: meilisearch/meilisearch/uncategorized, meilisearch/multi_search_analytics, meilisearch/tasks)

flows.name: search-documents
flows.description: User performs a single-index search via GET or POST, including facet search and similar document retrieval.

flows.name: federated-multi-index-search
flows.description: User searches across multiple indexes in a single federated query.

flows.name: manage-documents
flows.description: User adds, updates, retrieves, or deletes documents within an index, including bulk and filter-based operations.

flows.name: manage-indexes
flows.description: User creates, lists, updates, deletes, or swaps indexes and views their stats.

flows.name: configure-index-settings
flows.description: User retrieves, updates, or resets per-index settings such as ranking rules, facets, and synonyms.

flows.name: manage-api-keys
flows.description: User creates, lists, retrieves, updates, or deletes API keys to control access.

flows.name: create-dump-or-snapshot
flows.description: User triggers a database dump or snapshot export for backup and migration purposes.

flows.name: register-and-batch-tasks
flows.description: User enqueues a new task (document addition, index creation, settings update, etc.) which gets registered, auto-batched, and scheduled for processing.

flows.name: process-document-operations
flows.description: Scheduler processes batched document addition, update, or deletion operations against an index.

flows.name: cancel-tasks
flows.description: User cancels enqueued or processing tasks matching a given filter query.

flows.name: delete-tasks
flows.description: User permanently deletes completed or cancelled tasks from the task queue.

flows.name: create-dump
flows.description: User triggers a dump creation task that exports the full database state to a compressed archive.

flows.name: create-snapshot
flows.description: User triggers a snapshot creation task that persists a point-in-time copy of all indexes.

flows.name: swap-indexes
flows.description: User swaps the content of two named indexes atomically in a single scheduled task.

flows.name: upgrade-database
flows.description: System automatically registers and processes an upgrade task when Meilisearch detects a version change, migrating internal data structures.

features.name: milli/search
features.description: Full-text and faceted search execution including ranking, scoring, filtering, facet computation, and prompt-based result enrichment.

flows.name: execute-keyword-search
flows.description: User submits a text query and receives ranked documents using typo-tolerance, proximity, and other ranking rules.

flows.name: execute-hybrid-search
flows.description: User submits a query that blends keyword and semantic vector search results using a weighted score merge.

flows.name: find-similar-documents
flows.description: User requests documents semantically similar to a given document ID using vector embeddings.

flows.name: browse-facet-distribution
flows.description: User retrieves the distribution of facet values (with counts) across a set of candidate documents.

flows.name: search-facet-values
flows.description: User searches within a specific facet field to find matching facet values, optionally scoped to a search query context.

features.name: milli/update
features.description: Pipeline for ingesting, transforming, and persisting new or updated documents into the index, including tokenisation, extraction, and incremental updates.

flows.name: index-documents
flows.description: User adds or replaces documents in an index via NDJSON payloads, triggering extraction, enrichment, and write-back of all derived data structures.

flows.name: delete-documents
flows.description: User deletes specific documents from an index by their internal document IDs.

flows.name: clear-all-documents
flows.description: User wipes all documents from an index in a single operation.

flows.name: update-index-settings
flows.description: User changes index configuration (searchable fields, filterable attributes, embedders, etc.) which triggers a full or partial reindex.

flows.name: update-documents-by-function
flows.description: User applies a JavaScript-like function to transform existing documents in-place across the index.

flows.name: import-partial-dump
flows.description: User restores documents into an index from a dump snapshot via the partial-dump indexer path.

flows.name: upgrade-index-version
flows.description: User (or system) migrates an existing index database through successive version upgrade steps.

features.name: meilisearch-types
features.description: Shared Meilisearch domain types, deserialization helpers, edition-specific models, and their snapshot test fixtures. (merged: crates/meilisearch-types/meilisearch-types/uncategorized, meilisearch-types/snapshots)

bug_fix_prs.title: fix: handle empty VERSION file as missing (#6202)
bug_fix_prs.author: themavik

flows.name: run-benchmarks
flows.description: Developer runs benchmark workloads against a Meilisearch instance and reports results to a dashboard.

flows.name: upgrade-database-offline
flows.description: Operator upgrades a Meilisearch database to a newer major version without a dump using meilitool.

flows.name: export-database-dump
flows.description: Operator exports a dump from the Meilisearch database via the meilitool CLI.

flows.name: clear-task-queue
flows.description: Operator clears the Meilisearch task queue using the meilitool CLI to recover from a stuck state.

flows.name: generate-openapi-spec
flows.description: Developer generates and validates the OpenAPI specification for Meilisearch routes.

flows.name: generate-prototype-tag
flows.description: Developer creates a versioned git prototype tag for the current Meilisearch build via cargo xtask.

flows.name: convert-trace-to-profile
flows.description: Developer converts tracing trace output into Firefox Profiler or call-stats format for performance analysis.

features.name: meilisearch/ai-chat
features.description: AI-powered chat completion workspace that integrates LLM providers (OpenAI, Mistral) with Meilisearch search results to deliver grounded conversational responses.

flows.name: list-chat-workspaces
flows.description: User retrieves all available chat workspaces.

flows.name: get-chat-workspace
flows.description: User retrieves details of a specific chat workspace by its UID.

flows.name: delete-chat-workspace
flows.description: User deletes a specific chat workspace by its UID.

flows.name: send-chat-completion
flows.description: User sends a chat completion request to an LLM through a workspace, triggering AI-powered search and streaming response.

flows.name: get-chat-workspace-settings
flows.description: User retrieves the LLM and prompt settings for a specific chat workspace.

flows.name: update-chat-workspace-settings
flows.description: User updates the LLM source, API key, base URL, or prompt settings for a chat workspace.

flows.name: reset-chat-workspace-settings
flows.description: User resets all settings of a chat workspace back to their defaults.

flows.name: chat-completions
flows.description: User interacts with AI chat workspaces, sending messages and managing chat settings.

features.name: dump
features.description: Reads and parses structured document formats, providing deserialization and data extraction capabilities used across the indexing and search pipeline.

flows.name: create-dump
flows.description: User initiates a dump export, serializing all indexes, tasks, keys, and settings into a versioned gzip archive.

flows.name: import-dump
flows.description: User imports a previously created dump archive, automatically upgrading it from any supported version (V1–V6) to the current format.

flows.name: create-api-key
flows.description: User creates a new API key with specified actions, indexes, and expiration.

flows.name: update-api-key
flows.description: User updates the name or description of an existing API key.

flows.name: authorize-api-key-action
flows.description: System validates an encoded API key and checks whether it is permitted to perform a given action on a target index.

flows.name: dump-api-keys
flows.description: Operator exports all stored API keys to a flat file as part of a database dump.

flows.name: restore-api-keys-from-dump
flows.description: Operator imports API keys from a previously created dump file into the auth store.

flows.name: auth-control-flow
flows.description: Manages authentication controller initialization and credential validation.

features.name: meilisearch/network
features.description: Distributed network topology management for multi-node Meilisearch clusters, including shard configuration, remote node registration, and request proxying between nodes.

flows.name: get-network-topology
flows.description: User retrieves the list of known Meilisearch instances and their topology in the network.

flows.name: configure-network-remotes
flows.description: User updates the network topology by adding, modifying, or removing remote Meilisearch instances.

flows.name: trigger-network-topology-change
flows.description: User (Enterprise) posts a network control event to propagate a topology change across all nodes in the cluster.

flows.name: federated-search-across-network
flows.description: User issues a federated multi-index search that is distributed across shards hosted on remote network nodes.

features.name: filter-parser
features.description: A filter expression parser for MeiliSearch that tokenizes and parses filter query strings into structured condition trees, with fuzz testing corpus to ensure robustness against malformed input.

flows.name: parse-filter-expression
flows.description: User submits a filter string which is parsed into a structured FilterCondition AST supporting logical operators, comparisons, geo filters, and existence checks.

flows.name: parse-filter-via-cli
flows.description: Developer passes a filter string as a CLI argument to validate and debug filter expressions from the command line.

flows.name: fuzz-filter-parser
flows.description: Fuzzer feeds arbitrary byte sequences into the filter parser to detect panics or internal errors.

features.name: documentation
features.description: Documentation, tutorials, examples, and marketing pages.

flows.name: emit-git-build-metadata
flows.description: During a Cargo build, the build script runs vergen to capture git branch, commit SHA, message, timestamp, and describe tag, making them available as compile-time environment variables embedded in the binary.

flows.name: flatten-json-object
flows.description: User pipes a nested JSON object via stdin and receives a dot-notation flattened JSON object on stdout.

flows.name: flatten-json-programmatically
flows.description: Caller invokes the public `flatten` function directly to flatten a nested serde_json Map in their own application.

features.name: routes
features.description: HTTP route definitions and the procedural macros that support route registration. (merged: routes-macros)
